onChange.template: [Category: mergeladder] Apply the Gummy Fruits art style to all merge ladder items. Soft-shaded with translucent edges and vinyl figure charm. After applying, update the gameplan to reflect the new appearance.

[Category: mergeladder] Apply the Pixel Fruits art style to all merge ladder items. Retro pixel art with chunky outlines and limited palette. After applying, update the gameplan to reflect the new appearance.

[Category: mergeladder] Apply the Plush Toys art style to all merge ladder items. Soft fabric texture with stitching details and button eyes. After applying, update the gameplan to reflect the new appearance.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/category.schema.json, set mlc_tier_count to {{mlc_tier_count}}]
Set the merge ladder tier count to {{mlc_tier_count}} in the game. Regenerate the full tier ladder with appropriate sizes and scores.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/category.schema.json, set mlc_size_progression to {{mlc_size_progression}}]
Set size progression to {{mlc_size_progression}}. Gentle=items grow slowly; Aggressive=rapid size increase fills container faster.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/category.schema.json, set mlc_spawn_pool to {{mlc_spawn_pool}}]
Set spawn pool to {{mlc_spawn_pool}}. Narrow=only smallest spawn; Wide=more variety but harder to chain.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/category.schema.json, set mlt_base_radius to {{mlt_base_radius}}]
Set the smallest tier (Cherry) radius to {{mlt_base_radius}} pixels and scale all other tiers proportionally.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/category.schema.json, set mlt_max_radius to {{mlt_max_radius}}]
Set the largest tier (Watermelon) radius to {{mlt_max_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/category.schema.json, set mlt_score_multiplier to {{mlt_score_multiplier}}]
Multiply all tier score values by {{mlt_score_multiplier}}x.
